Some of

Our Collections

An asymmetric visual diary celebrating raw organic textures, unstructured premium silhouettes, and the quiet luxury of Normandy craftsmanship.

WHO WE ARE?

Weaving
Elegance
into
Everyday

At VL Global, we create thoughtfully crafted linen shirts designed for comfort, simplicity, and everyday living. From carefully selected fabrics to refined tailoring details, every piece is made to feel natural, breathable, and timeless.

SHOP BY

Categories

From breathable linen textures to refined cotton blends, each fabric is selected for everyday wear, natural comfort, and timeless simplicity.

01 / CATEGORY

Pure Materials

Explore pure linen and cotton fabrics designed for breathability, natural texture, and everyday wear, with lightweight finishes and timeless detailing suited for modern wardrobes.

Discover Collection
02 / CATEGORY

Effortless Everyday

Find ready-to-wear shirts designed with clean tailoring and everyday ease. Choose your preferred fabric, select your size and fit, and enjoy shirts made for regular wear.

Discover Collection
03 / CATEGORY

Your Fit, Your Way

Create a more personal look with made-to-wear shirts tailored with refined details. Customize selected elements such as collars, cuffs, and buttons while maintaining a comfortable fit.

Discover Collection
04 / CATEGORY

Fully Yours

Create a fully personalized shirt tailored around your measurements and preferences. From fit o finishing details, every piece is shaped to reflect your individual style.

Discover Collection
05 / L'Atelier Vivant

The Moving Gallery

Custom

Tailored Just For You

Stop compromising with standard sizes. Your body is unique, and your clothing should reflect that individuality. This is where we move beyond ready-to-wear and create a garment designed for your exact silhouette, style, and success.

Step 01

It Doesn't Just Fit. It Understands You.

Our process begins not with a tape measure, but with a conversation. We account for every nuance: your posture, your dominant hand, the slope of your shoulders, and how you naturally move. This detailed understanding ensures your garment feels like a second skin.

Step 02

Select Your Fit

Ready-to-wear is made for the average person.

Step 03

Add Details

Tailoring fixes the mismatch between an 'off-the-rack' garment and your actual physique, Tailoring makes clothes fit your shoulders, and arms.

Bespoke
FEATURED

Everything You Need to Know

Vian Luxure · Linen Experts

Looking for Linen in Your Style?
